# PolicyWell

> PolicyWell is the insurance intelligence platform connecting policyholders, advisors, IMOs, and carriers through explainable recommendations and human-approved workflows.

## The one page to read

- [Start here](https://policywell.ai/docs): Common use cases and getting started

## Common use cases

- [Policy Intelligence](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/policy-intelligence): Upload and analyze life insurance policies
- [Annuity Intelligence](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/annuity-intelligence): FIA, MYGA, SPIA analysis and comparisons
- [AI Insurance Assistant](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/ai-insurance-assistant): Embedded assistant for consumers and advisors
- [Document Processing](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/document-processing): Ingest policies and illustrations
- [Recommendation Engine](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/recommendation-engine): Funding, coverage, and exchange recommendations
- [Advisor CRM Integration](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/advisor-crm-integration): Salesforce, Redtail, Wealthbox, HubSpot, Dynamics
- [Carrier APIs](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/carrier-apis): Quotes, illustrations, underwriting, and servicing
- [IMO Platform](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/imo-platform): Advisor networks and book-of-business intelligence
- [Webhooks](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/webhooks): Lifecycle event notifications
- [Workflow Automation](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/workflow-automation): Reviews, notifications, and follow-ups
- [White-Label Platform](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/white-label-platform): Branded multi-tenant deployments
- [AI Agent SDK](https://policywell.ai/docs/guides/ai-agent-sdk): Specialized insurance agents

## Platform

- [CLI](https://policywell.ai/docs/cli): Enterprise and batch automation
- [Engineering](https://policywell.ai/docs/engineering): Architecture reference
- [Pricing](https://policywell.ai/pricing): Packaging for the insurance ecosystem
